subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the Blessed Beauty! Verily thou art the herald of the Covenant and a sacrifice in the path of the Day-Star of the horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده باوفای جمال مبارک حقا که منادی میثاقی و جانفشان در ره نیر آفاق بعد از
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @methods of teaching the Cause
